title: Novavax Q2 2023 Earnings Report: Seasonal Demand Patterns and Market Challenges Emerge
text: Novavax reported second quarter 2023 total revenue of $424.4 million, up from the $185.9 million from the same period a year ago. The company achieved net income during this period. Revenue guidance was updated throughout 2023 as market dynamics shifted. Early in the year, Novavax provided full year 2023 total revenue guidance of between $1.4 and $1.6 billion. In Q2 2023, updated guidance reflected approximately $700 million from advance purchase agreements based on 2023 committed dose delivery schedules, with additional U.S. market sales subject to updated variant manufacturing and regulatory approvals. The company's Q2 performance demonstrated the seasonal nature of COVID-19 vaccine demand and the challenges of relying heavily on advance purchase agreements. Total revenue for the full year 2023 ultimately came in at $984 million, well below the original guidance range of $1.4-$1.6 billion. This significant miss highlighted the unpredictability of vaccine demand and the company's over-reliance on APA revenues. The quarter showed Novavax transitioning from peak COVID vaccine revenues toward sustainable long-term business models.
